summary: Team is advancing the China Going Global report and Asia Start campaign with parallel AI and traditional routes.
summaryDetail: The report, jointly published with IE, is set for a mid-September launch in Singapore, with events at Tech in Asia and Tyson. The Asia Start campaign is running two parallel routes for the first month, while the Intelligent China program targets foreigners with an English-language focus on module one. Key tasks include translating articles, finalizing drafts, and coordinating meetings.

meetings.title: Joint Report Planning for Chinese Companies Going Global
meetings.summary: Team discusses joint report between CKGSB and IE on Chinese companies globalizing to Southeast Asia, with op-eds from both schools' leadership and industry case studies. Report to launch at Tech in Asia or Tyson event in Singapore in September.

meetings.title: Asia Start & New Program Planning
meetings.summary: Discussed Asia Start campaign with two routes (AI vs traditional) and a new Intelligent China program launching in December. Need to finalize campaign approach and start SCM for the new program.

meetings.title: Europe-China Cooperation Discussion
meetings.summary: Discussion on the importance of Europe-China relations, geopolitical tensions, and the role of companies in navigating de-risking and market constraints.

actionItems.text: Meet with Tech in Asia tomorrow to confirm event theme and possibility of launching report there.
actionItems.meetingTitle: Joint Report Planning for Chinese Companies Going Global
actionItems.detail: Determine if Tech in Asia session will focus on Chinese companies globalizing, and if report can be launched at their event.

actionItems.text: Meet with Tyson tomorrow to discuss report launch or distribution at their event.
actionItems.meetingTitle: Joint Report Planning for Chinese Companies Going Global
actionItems.detail: Ask Tyson about featuring CKGSB panel and launching report at their event on Sep 29-30.

actionItems.text: Translate the bulk of the Chinese report into English.
actionItems.meetingTitle: Joint Report Planning for Chinese Companies Going Global
actionItems.detail: Translate Professor Leeway's research for the English report.

actionItems.text: Prepare a one-pager proposal for the report structure, title, and promotion plan.
actionItems.meetingTitle: Joint Report Planning for Chinese Companies Going Global
actionItems.detail: Create a one-page document to show to the president, including report structure, title, and promotion plan.

actionItems.text: Look into WeChat official account articles for alumni case studies to translate.
actionItems.meetingTitle: Joint Report Planning for Chinese Companies Going Global
actionItems.detail: Search WeChat accounts for relevant alumni stories about going global to use as industry perspective.

actionItems.text: Contact Professor Santiago about writing an op-ed or case study on Haier.
actionItems.meetingTitle: Joint Report Planning for Chinese Companies Going Global
actionItems.detail: Ask if Santiago can contribute a case study on Haier's acquisition model.

actionItems.text: Start Asia Start campaign with two routes: AI (Joseph) and traditional (Daisy).
actionItems.detail: Joseph will lead AI route, Daisy traditional route for first month.

actionItems.text: Get website for Intelligent China program ready.
actionItems.detail: Joseph working with team on website; nearly ready.

actionItems.text: Begin SCM campaign for Intelligent China program after webpage is done.
actionItems.detail: Simultaneously start SCM campaign once webpage is live.

actionItems.text: Decide on campaign route for Intelligent China program.
actionItems.detail: Choose between AI (Joseph) or traditional (Daisy) route for this program.

actionItems.text: Translate Prof Li Wei's FT Chinese article related to China going global report
actionItems.meetingTitle: FW: 长江商学院媒体监测日报2026-6-25
actionItems.detail: Ira suggested translating the article as it relates to one of our reports.

actionItems.text: Finalize Prof Zhu Yang's article 'Timing Itself Can Be Strategy' against Chinese near-final draft
actionItems.meetingTitle: FW: News Article on 'Disruptive Timing' Paper
actionItems.detail: Ira sent a rewrite of Prof Zhu Yang's article and asked Julie to double check against the Chinese draft and finalize.

actionItems.text: Send Prof Sun Tianshu the press release about his Summer Davos presence on WeChat
actionItems.meetingTitle: Re: press release - Sun Tianshu at Summer Davos 2026
actionItems.detail: Julie asked Ira to send the press release to Prof Sun on WeChat after she made edits.

actionItems.text: Review Joseph's translation of Prof Ouyang Hui's article for Knowledge platform
actionItems.meetingTitle: Re: Translation: Ouyang Hui — The Resilience Code
actionItems.detail: Joseph translated the article and asked for review; Ira will look at it and revert.

actionItems.text: Publish academic seminars on English website events section going forward
actionItems.meetingTitle: FW: publishing academic seminars on website
actionItems.detail: Ira asked Kaylee and Xuan to take turns publishing academic seminars on the English website's events section.

actionItems.text: Save all final files, including monthly website reports, to school's Cloud
actionItems.detail: Joseph confirmed he will save final files to the school's Cloud going forward.

actionItems.text: Coordinate with Flow and pencil in meeting on Monday afternoon for brochure review
actionItems.meetingTitle: 答复: 答复:  答复: CKGSB School Brochure (长江商学院学院英文介绍手册)_June 2026
actionItems.detail: Julie will coordinate with Flow to schedule a meeting with Ira on Monday afternoon.

actionItems.text: Attend meeting with Miguel from Tech In Asia on June 26 at 4pm SGT
actionItems.meetingTitle: 答复: CKGSB X Tech In ASIA
actionItems.detail: Xuan confirmed a meeting with Miguel for tomorrow at 4pm SGT to discuss collaboration.

decisions.text: Report will be jointly published by CKGSB and IE, with main research from Professor Leeway and op-eds from both schools' leadership.
decisions.meetingTitle: Joint Report Planning for Chinese Companies Going Global

decisions.text: Working title is 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global'.
decisions.meetingTitle: Joint Report Planning for Chinese Companies Going Global

decisions.text: Report will be ready by early September for launch in Singapore in mid-September.
decisions.meetingTitle: Joint Report Planning for Chinese Companies Going Global

decisions.text: At least one of the two events (Tech in Asia or Tyson) will be used for launch; the other for distribution.
decisions.meetingTitle: Joint Report Planning for Chinese Companies Going Global

decisions.text: Asia Start campaign will run two parallel routes for first month: AI and traditional.
Intelligent China program targets foreigners, is in English, and focuses on module one first.
Joseph will translate the FT Chinese article by Prof Li Wei.

Julie will coordinate with Flow for a meeting on Monday afternoon.
